description: Material life-cycle discontinuity timeline: drawn time axis, then three stations — INHERENT (pouring ladle + ingot mold cutaway w/ porosity, inclusions, branched shrinkage pipe), PROCESSING (rolling mill w/ lap + burst, GMAW torch over V-groove w/ centerline weld crack), SERVICE-INDUCED (4-bolt flange w/ bolt-hole fatigue crack, corrosion pitting on pipe, cyclic-load arrows). Tag rows reveal after each stage.
